responses.electricityComment: Too high electricity prices, the smart meter is horrible for excessive fees
responses.roadComment: They roads were recently relaid with cement and the tow lanes are  not aligned one is up by a couple of millimeters , so that the rain can destroy them, plus the metro work all over the city !
responses.commentsText: Thanks for doing this, adding my own answer as the first survey I conduct for this exercise soo let's do this !

responses.electricityComment: Supply is good, bills are too high
responses.safetyComment: More and brighter street lights, rickshaw's not plying
responses.commentsText: Even though it was known as a chor gully earlier, in the 1980 and before, today it's pretty safe !

responses.electricityComment: Supply is good, throughout the year. However, the electrical poles are not maintained well. It is quite risky at some places.
responses.roadComment: They build concrete roads every few years, for drainage, and they say, they forgot install pipes and they build again, but the build quality is bad.
responses.commentsText: There is no drainage system in my neighbourhood yet. All my lifetime, we still have open gutters. However recently they installed drainage system pipes inside the roads, but the pipes they installed are so low quality, and the size of the pipe is just 6 inches. I wonder, how is that gonna hold up.

responses.electricityComment: The cost is very high and there is a infrequent yet irritating electricity loss
responses.loveText: The People and sometimes good air
responses.commentsText: It is a good neighbourhood to movie into.
